meaning: n.飞行,航空,航空学,航空术
examples: The man had genius and had made his mark in the aviation world.
The civil aviation minister ordered all the planes to be grounded.
The airline's biggest headache is the increase in the price of aviation fuel.
Operations will also focus on horse transportation, aviation training and opportunities offered by the London Olympics.
The plan is to create a leading aviation hub for the east of England.
